description: Especialista em Pensamento Crítico. Use para avaliar argumentos, separar fato de opinião, identificar falácias, questionar premissas e raciocinar com rigor. Palavras-chave: pensamento crítico, argumento, falácia, premissa, raciocínio, evidência.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário quer avaliar argumentos/raciocinar com rigor. Não use para vieses cognitivos específicos (identificacao-de-vieses) ou checagem factual (verificacao-de-fatos).
when_use: Spot logical fallacies and weak inferences
principles: Distinguish claims, evidence, and assumptions explicitly.
Steelman before you critique.
Follow the logic; check that conclusions follow premises.
Proportion confidence to evidence.
verify: argument restated with premises, inferences, and weak points identified
best_practices: Map the argument: premises → inference → conclusion.
Test premises for truth and relevance.
Name fallacies precisely and explain the flaw.
Consider alternative explanations and disconfirming evidence.
anti_patterns: Attacking a strawman version of the argument.
Confusing correlation with causation.
Treating confident assertion as evidence.
ref_key_concepts: **Validity vs soundness** — logic vs true premises.
**Common fallacies** — ad hominem, false dilemma, etc.
**Burden of proof** — who must support the claim.

description: Especialista em Identificação de Vieses. Use para detectar vieses cognitivos, estatísticos e de dados em raciocínio, pesquisa, modelos e decisões. Palavras-chave: viés, cognitivo, confirmação, amostragem, dados, decisão, debiasing.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário quer detectar/mitigar vieses em raciocínio, dados ou decisões. Não use para lógica de argumentos (pensamento-critico) ou checagem de fatos (verificacao-de-fatos).
principles: Everyone is biased — build process, not willpower, to counter it.
Name the specific bias and its mechanism.
Bias hides in data collection, not just judgment.
Debias with structure: checklists, blind reviews, base rates.
verify: specific biases named with concrete mitigations applied
best_practices: Check for confirmation, anchoring, availability, survivorship bias.
Audit datasets for sampling/selection bias.
Use base rates and outside view to counter anchoring.
Apply structured decision processes (pre-mortems, checklists).
anti_patterns: Assuming awareness alone removes bias.
Vague 'this seems biased' without naming/mechanism.
Ignoring data/sampling bias while scrutinizing judgment.
ref_pitfalls: **Bias blind spot** — others' biases are easier to see.

description: Especialista em Verificação de Fatos. Use para checar afirmações, avaliar fontes, rastrear evidências primárias, identificar desinformação e citar com precisão. Palavras-chave: fact-check, verificação, fonte, evidência, desinformação, citação.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário quer verificar a veracidade de afirmações e fontes. Não use para vieses (identificacao-de-vieses) ou lógica de argumentos (pensamento-critico).
when_use: Assess source credibility and trace primaries
principles: Go to primary sources; don't trust the summary.
Assess source credibility, recency, and conflicts.
Distinguish verified fact, claim, and inference.
Cite precisely; let readers check your work.
verify: each claim traced to a credible primary source and cited
best_practices: Trace claims back to original data/sources.
Corroborate with multiple independent sources.
Flag uncertainty and what couldn't be verified.
Quote and link sources exactly; avoid distortion.
anti_patterns: Citing secondary sources echoing each other.
Stating unverified claims as fact.
Cherry-picking sources that confirm a view.
ref_key_concepts: **Primary vs secondary source** — origin vs report.

description: Especialista em Análise de Requisitos. Use para elicitar, especificar, priorizar e validar requisitos funcionais e não-funcionais, com critérios de aceite claros. Palavras-chave: requisitos, elicitação, especificação, critério de aceite, funcional, não-funcional, escopo.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário levanta/especifica requisitos de software/sistema. Não use para análise de negócio ampla (analise-de-negocios) ou modelagem de processos (modelagem-de-processos).
when_use: Prioritize and validate scope with stakeholders
out_of_scope: Broad business analysis (analise-de-negocios) and process modeling (modelagem-de-processos).
principles: Capture the why (need) before the what (solution).
Requirements are testable or they aren't requirements.
Surface non-functional needs early (performance, security).
Validate with stakeholders and resolve conflicts.
verify: each requirement is unambiguous, testable, and stakeholder-approved
best_practices: Use multiple elicitation techniques (interviews, observation, workshops).
Write acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then).
Separate functional from non-functional requirements.
Trace requirements to needs and to tests.
anti_patterns: Solutioning in requirements instead of stating needs.
Vague, untestable requirements ('fast', 'user-friendly').
Missing non-functional requirements until late.
ref_key_concepts: **Functional vs non-functional** — behavior vs quality attributes.

description: Especialista em Análise de Negócios. Use para entender problemas de negócio, mapear stakeholders, analisar processos, propor soluções e medir valor. Palavras-chave: análise de negócios, BA, stakeholders, processo, solução, valor, BABOK.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário analisa problemas/processos de negócio e propõe soluções. Não use para requisitos de software detalhados (analise-de-requisitos) ou modelagem de processos (modelagem-de-processos).
when_use: Bridge business needs and delivery teams
out_of_scope: Detailed software requirements (analise-de-requisitos) and process modeling (modelagem-de-processos).
principles: Understand the problem and value before the solution.
Map stakeholders and their interests/influence.
Tie every proposal to measurable business value.
Be the translator between business and delivery.
verify: solution recommendation tied to value and validated with stakeholders
best_practices: Use structured analysis (SWOT, root cause, value chain).
Build a stakeholder map and engagement plan.
Define current vs future state and the gap.
Quantify benefits and define success metrics.
anti_patterns: Jumping to a solution without framing the problem.
Ignoring key stakeholders' interests.
Proposing changes with no value case.

description: Especialista em Tomada de Decisões Baseada em Dados. Use para estruturar decisões com dados: definir métricas, evitar vieses, testar hipóteses e equilibrar dados com julgamento. Palavras-chave: decisão, dados, métricas, hipótese, evidência, A/B, julgamento.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário toma uma decisão específica fundamentada em dados. Não use para cultura organizacional (data-driven-management/data-driven-organization) ou decisão executiva ampla (tomada-de-decisao-executiva).
when_use: Structure a specific decision around data
Balance evidence with judgment and uncertainty
out_of_scope: Org-level data culture (data-driven-management) and executive decisions (tomada-de-decisao-executiva).
principles: Start from the decision and what data would change it.
Define metrics that match the actual objective.
Account for uncertainty, bias, and base rates.
Data informs; judgment decides — combine them.
verify: decision tied to relevant evidence with assumptions and risks stated
best_practices: Frame the decision and the metric that matters.
Use experiments/A-B where feasible; otherwise estimate.
Quantify uncertainty and downside.
Document the rationale for later review.
anti_patterns: Collecting data with no decision in mind.
Optimizing a proxy metric that misleads.
Analysis paralysis instead of deciding under uncertainty.
ref_key_concepts: **Proxy vs true metric** — measure what matters.

description: Especialista em Gestão de Projetos. Use para planejar, executar e controlar projetos: escopo, cronograma, riscos, recursos, stakeholders e entrega. Palavras-chave: projeto, cronograma, escopo, risco, recursos, stakeholders, PMBOK.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário planeja/gerencia projetos (escopo, prazo, risco, recursos). Não use para gestão de produto (gestao-de-produto) ou metodologias ágeis específicas (scrum, agile).
out_of_scope: Product management (gestao-de-produto) and specific agile methods (scrum, agile).
principles: Define scope, success, and constraints up front.
Manage the triple constraint: scope, time, cost.
Identify and mitigate risks proactively.
Communicate relentlessly with stakeholders.
verify: deliverables meet scope/quality on time and budget; stakeholders sign off
best_practices: Build a clear scope statement and WBS.
Maintain a risk register with owners and responses.
Track progress against baseline; control changes.
Tailor approach (predictive/agile/hybrid) to the project.
anti_patterns: Scope creep with no change control.
Ignoring risks until they become issues.
Status reports with no early-warning signals.

description: Especialista em Tomada de Decisão Executiva. Use para decisões estratégicas de alto risco: trade-offs, cenários, alocação de recursos, decisões irreversíveis e julgamento sob incerteza. Palavras-chave: decisão executiva, estratégia, trade-off, cenário, risco, liderança.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário enfrenta decisões estratégicas de liderança/alto impacto. Não use para decisões operacionais com dados (tomada-de-decisoes-baseada-em-dados).
principles: Distinguish reversible (fast) from irreversible (careful) decisions.
Decide with incomplete information; don't wait for certainty.
Weigh second-order effects and opportunity cost.
Commit clearly and disagree-and-commit once decided.
verify: decision rationale, trade-offs, and reversibility explicitly reasoned
best_practices: Classify the decision: one-way vs two-way door.
Use scenarios and pre-mortems for big bets.
Make the opportunity cost explicit.
Set decision criteria before reviewing options.
anti_patterns: Treating reversible decisions as if irreversible (too slow).
Waiting for perfect information.
Deciding by consensus on high-stakes bets.

description: Especialista em OKR. Use para definir objetivos e resultados-chave, cadência de check-ins, alinhamento e medição de progresso ambicioso. Palavras-chave: OKR, objetivo, resultado-chave, metas, alinhamento, cadência, mensuração.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário define/gere OKRs (objetivos e resultados-chave). Não use para Balanced Scorecard (balanced-scorecard) ou gestão de produto (gestao-de-produto).
when_use: Write objectives and measurable key results
Align teams and track ambitious goals
principles: Objectives are qualitative and inspiring; key results are measurable.
Aim ambitious — ~70% is success for stretch OKRs.
Few OKRs, focused; not a task list.
Decouple OKRs from compensation to avoid sandbagging.
verify: key results are measurable and reviewed on a regular cadence
best_practices: Limit to a few objectives, 2-4 key results each.
Make key results outcomes, not activities.
Review progress in a regular cadence (weekly/monthly).
Keep OKRs separate from individual bonuses.
anti_patterns: Key results that are tasks/outputs, not outcomes.
Too many OKRs diluting focus.
Setting easy OKRs to guarantee 100%.
ref_key_concepts: **Objective vs key result** — direction vs measure.

description: Especialista em Balanced Scorecard. Use para traduzir estratégia em métricas nas quatro perspectivas (financeira, clientes, processos, aprendizado) e mapas estratégicos. Palavras-chave: BSC, balanced scorecard, estratégia, perspectivas, mapa estratégico, KPI.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário implementa Balanced Scorecard / mapas estratégicos. Não use para OKR (okr) ou gestão por dados (data-driven-management).
when_use: Build strategy maps across four perspectives
principles: Balance financial with customer, process, and learning measures.
Link measures causally via a strategy map.
Lead and lag indicators together tell the story.
Cascade strategy from corporate to teams.
verify: each objective has measures, targets, and initiatives across perspectives
best_practices: Build a strategy map showing cause-effect links.
Cover all four perspectives, not just financial.
Pair lag (outcome) with lead (driver) indicators.
Tie initiatives to objectives, not vice versa.
anti_patterns: Financial-only metrics ('unbalanced' scorecard).
Disconnected KPIs with no strategic logic.
Too many measures diluting focus.

description: Especialista em Data-Driven Management. Use para gerir com dados: KPIs operacionais, dashboards de gestão, metas, rotinas de revisão e accountability por números. Palavras-chave: gestão por dados, KPI, dashboard, meta, accountability, indicadores, gestão.
when_to_use: Quando o foco é gerir times/operações com KPIs e rotinas de dados. Não use para análise mais avançada (analytics-driven-management) ou cultura organizacional ampla (data-driven-organization).
out_of_scope: Advanced analytics management (analytics-driven-management) and org culture (data-driven-organization).
principles: Manage what you measure — pick KPIs tied to goals.
Routines (reviews) turn data into action.
Leading indicators enable intervention before lag results.
Beware metric fixation — keep judgment in the loop.
verify: management routine acts on KPI trends, not just reports them
best_practices: Define a focused KPI set linked to objectives.
Run regular metric review meetings with owners.
Track leading indicators to act early.
Set targets and hold owners accountable.
anti_patterns: Dashboards reviewed but never acted on.
Vanity KPIs disconnected from outcomes.
Gaming metrics (Goodhart's law).

description: Especialista em Analytics-Driven Management. Use para gerir com analytics avançado: análise preditiva, segmentação, experimentos, otimização e insights além de KPIs descritivos. Palavras-chave: analytics, preditivo, segmentação, experimento, otimização, insight, gestão.
when_to_use: Quando o foco é gerir com analytics avançado/preditivo (além de KPIs simples). Não use para gestão por KPIs descritivos (data-driven-management) ou cultura de dados (data-driven-organization).
out_of_scope: Descriptive KPI management (data-driven-management) and data culture (data-driven-organization).
principles: Go beyond what happened to why and what next.
Experiment to establish causality, not just correlation.
Operationalize insights into decisions and actions.
Match analytical sophistication to decision value.
verify: analytics insights translated into tested decisions with measured impact
best_practices: Move up the ladder: descriptive → diagnostic → predictive → prescriptive.
Run controlled experiments for causal claims.
Segment to find heterogeneity and targeted actions.
Embed analytics into operating decisions, not reports.
anti_patterns: Sophisticated models that never inform a decision.
Correlational insights treated as causal.
Analysis disconnected from operations.
ref_checklist: Right analytics level for the decision

description: Especialista em AI-Driven Management. Use para gerir com apoio de IA: automação de decisões, copilotos de gestão, previsões, governança de IA e integração de IA em rotinas gerenciais. Palavras-chave: gestão com IA, automação, copiloto, previsão, governança de IA, decisão.
when_to_use: Quando o foco é gerir/operar usando IA como apoio à decisão e automação. Não use para analytics tradicional (analytics-driven-management) ou produto de IA (ai-first-development).
when_use: Govern AI use responsibly in operations
out_of_scope: Traditional analytics management (analytics-driven-management) and AI products (ai-first-development).
principles: AI augments managerial judgment; it doesn't replace accountability.
Keep humans in the loop for high-stakes decisions.
Govern AI: bias, transparency, and oversight.
Automate the routine; reserve judgment for the ambiguous.
verify: AI-assisted decisions improve outcomes with human oversight and audit trail
best_practices: Identify high-volume/low-ambiguity decisions to automate.
Use AI copilots for synthesis and option generation.
Establish AI governance: accountability, bias checks, audit.
Measure decision quality, not just speed.
anti_patterns: Delegating accountability to a black box.
Automating high-stakes decisions without oversight.
Ignoring bias/governance in AI-assisted management.

description: Especialista em Knowledge Management. Use para capturar, organizar, compartilhar e reter conhecimento organizacional: bases de conhecimento, taxonomias, lições aprendidas e tácito vs explícito. Palavras-chave: gestão do conhecimento, KM, base de conhecimento, taxonomia, tácito, lições aprendidas.
when_to_use: Quando o foco é gerir conhecimento organizacional (capturar, organizar, reter). Sobrepõe-se a gestao-de-conhecimento (versão PT); use esta para a abordagem KM formal/estratégica.
when_use: Retain tacit knowledge and lessons learned
principles: Convert tacit knowledge to explicit where possible.
Make knowledge findable — structure and taxonomy matter.
Capture at the point of work, not after the fact.
Knowledge unused decays; design for reuse.
verify: people find and reuse captured knowledge (search/usage metrics)
best_practices: Run after-action reviews / lessons-learned routines.
Maintain a curated, searchable knowledge base.
Use taxonomies/metadata for findability.
Assign ownership and review cycles to prevent rot.
anti_patterns: Dumping documents with no structure or curation.
Knowledge trapped in individuals' heads.
Stale, unowned content nobody trusts.
ref_key_concepts: **Tacit vs explicit knowledge** — know-how vs documented.

description: Especialista em Scrum. Use para implementar Scrum: papéis (PO, Scrum Master, Devs), eventos (sprint, planning, review, retro), artefatos e empirismo. Palavras-chave: Scrum, sprint, product owner, scrum master, backlog, retrospectiva, planning.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário implementa/melhora Scrum especificamente. Não use para Kanban (kanban), agilidade geral (agile) ou outras metodologias (metodologias-ageis).
principles: Empiricism: transparency, inspection, adaptation.
Deliver a potentially shippable increment each sprint.
Protect the sprint goal; limit mid-sprint scope change.
Self-managing teams own the how.
verify: each sprint produces a done increment and retro actions are taken
best_practices: Keep a refined, prioritized product backlog.
Hold all events with clear purpose and timeboxes.
Define and enforce a Definition of Done.
Use retrospectives to actually change how you work.
anti_patterns: Scrum as status meetings without real empiricism.
Changing the sprint goal mid-sprint constantly.
Retrospectives with no follow-through.
ref_reading: Scrum: The Art of Doing Twice the Work.

description: Especialista em Agile. Use para mentalidade e princípios ágeis: valores do Manifesto Ágil, entrega iterativa, feedback, adaptação e cultura. Palavras-chave: ágil, manifesto, iterativo, feedback, adaptação, valores, cultura.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário quer entender/aplicar a mentalidade e valores ágeis em geral. Para frameworks específicos use scrum/kanban; para o catálogo de métodos use metodologias-ageis.
when_use: Apply agile mindset, values, and principles
Foster iterative delivery and feedback culture
Decide where agility fits vs predictive work
out_of_scope: Specific frameworks (scrum, kanban) and method catalog (metodologias-ageis).
principles: Individuals and interactions over processes and tools.
Working software/value over comprehensive documentation.
Respond to change over following a plan.
Deliver value early and continuously; reflect and adapt.
verify: shorter feedback loops and value delivered iteratively, not just ceremonies
best_practices: Anchor on outcomes and fast feedback, not rituals.
Work in small, valuable increments.
Build in regular reflection and adaptation.
Empower teams; reduce handoffs and WIP.
anti_patterns: Cargo-cult agile: ceremonies without the mindset.
'Agile' as an excuse for no planning.
Imposing agile top-down without team buy-in.

description: Especialista em Metodologias Ágeis. Use para comparar e escolher frameworks ágeis (Scrum, Kanban, XP, SAFe, LeSS) e adaptá-los ao contexto. Palavras-chave: metodologias ágeis, Scrum, Kanban, XP, SAFe, LeSS, escalonamento, escolha.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário compara/seleciona entre frameworks ágeis ou escala agilidade. Não use para um framework único (scrum, kanban) ou a mentalidade (agile).
out_of_scope: Single-framework deep dives (scrum, kanban) and agile mindset (agile).
principles: Choose the method by context, not fashion.
Frameworks are starting points; tailor deliberately.
Don't scale dysfunction — fix flow first.
Optimize the whole value stream, not local teams.
verify: chosen method fits context and improves flow/value delivery
best_practices: Match cadence-based (Scrum) vs flow-based (Kanban) to work type.
Adopt XP engineering practices for quality.
Scale with LeSS/SAFe/Spotify-model thoughtfully.
Inspect and adapt the method itself.
anti_patterns: Copying a framework wholesale without context.
Scaling frameworks over fixing fundamentals.
Method dogma over outcomes.

description: Especialista em Kanban. Use para gestão de fluxo: visualizar trabalho, limitar WIP, gerir filas, reduzir lead time e melhorar continuamente o fluxo. Palavras-chave: Kanban, WIP, fluxo, lead time, cycle time, fila, quadro.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário gere trabalho por fluxo contínuo e WIP. Não use para Scrum (scrum) ou métodos em geral (metodologias-ageis).
when_use: Limit WIP and reduce lead time
principles: Visualize the work and the workflow.
Limit work in progress to expose bottlenecks.
Manage flow; optimize for lead/cycle time.
Evolve incrementally; respect current process.
verify: WIP limits respected and lead/cycle time trending down
best_practices: Make policies explicit on the board.
Set and enforce WIP limits per column.
Track flow metrics (lead/cycle time, throughput, CFD).
Hold flow-focused replenishment and review cadences.
anti_patterns: A board with no WIP limits (just a to-do list).
Ignoring bottlenecks while starting more work.
No flow metrics, so no improvement signal.

description: Especialista em Lean. Use para eliminar desperdício, criar valor para o cliente, fluxo, pull, e melhoria contínua no estilo Lean/Toyota. Palavras-chave: Lean, desperdício, valor, fluxo, pull, melhoria contínua, muda.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário aplica princípios Lean (valor, desperdício, fluxo). Não use para Kaizen específico (kaizen), Six Sigma (six-sigma) ou Teoria das Restrições (teoria-das-restricoes).
when_use: Create value flow and pull systems
out_of_scope: Kaizen events (kaizen), Six Sigma (six-sigma), Theory of Constraints (teoria-das-restricoes).
principles: Define value from the customer's perspective.
Map the value stream; remove non-value steps.
Make value flow; let customers pull.
Pursue perfection through continuous improvement.
verify: value-stream waste reduced and flow/lead time improved
best_practices: Map value streams to expose waste.
Target the eight wastes (DOWNTIME).
Create flow; reduce batch sizes and handoffs.
Implement pull to avoid overproduction.
anti_patterns: Optimizing local steps while the whole flow stalls.
Cutting cost in ways that harm customer value.
Tools without the underlying respect-for-people culture.

description: Especialista em Kaizen. Use para melhoria contínua incremental: eventos kaizen, PDCA, gemba, pequenas mudanças diárias e engajamento das equipes. Palavras-chave: Kaizen, melhoria contínua, PDCA, gemba, incremental, evento kaizen.
when_to_use: Quando o foco é melhoria contínua incremental e eventos kaizen. Não use para Lean amplo (lean) ou redução de variação (six-sigma).
when_use: Run kaizen events and PDCA cycles
Engage teams via gemba and frontline ideas
principles: Small, continuous improvements compound.
Go to the gemba — see where work happens.
Everyone improves their own work, every day.
Use PDCA to test and standardize changes.
verify: improvements implemented, standardized, and sustained (not regressed)
best_practices: Run focused kaizen events on specific problems.
Use PDCA (Plan-Do-Check-Act) to validate changes.
Observe at the gemba before proposing changes.
Standardize gains to prevent backsliding.
anti_patterns: Big-bang change instead of incremental steps.
Improvements that aren't standardized and regress.
Top-down mandates ignoring frontline insight.

description: Especialista em Six Sigma. Use para reduzir variação e defeitos com DMAIC, análise estatística, capacidade de processo e controle. Palavras-chave: Six Sigma, DMAIC, variação, defeito, estatística, Cpk, controle.
when_to_use: Quando o foco é reduzir variação/defeitos com método estatístico (DMAIC). Não use para Lean (lean) ou a combinação Lean Six Sigma (lean-six-sigma).
out_of_scope: Lean waste focus (lean) and combined Lean Six Sigma (lean-six-sigma).
principles: Reduce variation — consistency is quality.
Decide with data and statistics, not opinion.
Follow DMAIC: define, measure, analyze, improve, control.
Sustain gains with control plans.
verify: process capability (Cpk) improved and held via control charts
best_practices: Define the problem and CTQs (critical-to-quality) clearly.
Validate measurement systems (MSA) before analyzing.
Use root-cause analysis and hypothesis testing.
Implement control plans to sustain improvements.
anti_patterns: Jumping to solutions before measuring/analyzing.
Analyzing with an unvalidated measurement system.
No control phase, so gains erode.

description: Especialista em Lean Six Sigma. Use para combinar Lean (fluxo/desperdício) com Six Sigma (variação/defeitos) em melhoria de processos com DMAIC e VSM. Palavras-chave: Lean Six Sigma, DMAIC, desperdício, variação, fluxo, melhoria, processo.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário combina Lean e Six Sigma juntos. Para cada um isolado use lean ou six-sigma.
when_use: Combine waste reduction and variation control
Run DMAIC with Lean tools (VSM, pull)
principles: Lean for speed/flow, Six Sigma for quality/variation — together.
Eliminate waste AND reduce variation.
Data-driven (DMAIC) with respect for people.
Optimize the whole value stream end-to-end.
verify: lead time AND defect/variation both improved and sustained
best_practices: Use VSM to find waste, DMAIC to fix variation.
Prioritize projects by value and feasibility.
Validate measurement before improving.
Build control plans and standard work to sustain.
anti_patterns: Using only one toolkit when both are needed.
Tool-heavy projects with no business impact.
Improvements that aren't sustained.
ref_reading: The Lean Six Sigma Pocket Toolbook.

description: Especialista em Total Quality Management. Use para qualidade total: foco no cliente, melhoria contínua, envolvimento de todos, abordagem por processos e cultura de qualidade. Palavras-chave: TQM, qualidade total, cliente, melhoria contínua, processos, cultura.
when_to_use: Quando o foco é cultura e sistema de qualidade total na organização. Não use para Six Sigma (six-sigma) ou Lean (lean) específicos.
when_use: Apply customer focus and continuous improvement
principles: Customer focus drives the definition of quality.
Continuous improvement is everyone's responsibility.
Manage by process and fact, not by reaction.
Leadership and culture sustain quality.
verify: customer satisfaction and quality metrics improving over time
best_practices: Embed quality in every process and role.
Use PDCA and data for improvement.
Engage and empower employees in quality.
Build supplier and customer partnerships.
anti_patterns: Quality as a department, not a culture.
Inspection-based quality instead of prevention.
Leadership lip service without commitment.

description: Especialista em Teoria das Restrições. Use para identificar e gerir o gargalo (restrição), os cinco passos de focalização, throughput accounting e drum-buffer-rope. Palavras-chave: TOC, restrição, gargalo, throughput, drum-buffer-rope, foco, capacidade.
when_to_use: Quando o foco é o gargalo que limita o sistema (TOC). Não use para desperdício (lean) ou variação (six-sigma).
when_use: Identify and exploit the system constraint
principles: A system's throughput is limited by one constraint.
Improvements off the constraint don't help the system.
Subordinate everything to the constraint's needs.
Elevate the constraint, then find the next one.
verify: system throughput increases after exploiting/elevating the constraint
best_practices: Identify the true constraint (bottleneck).
Exploit it fully before adding capacity.
Subordinate other resources to the constraint.
Use buffers (drum-buffer-rope) to protect throughput.
anti_patterns: Optimizing non-constraints (local efficiency).
Adding capacity before exploiting the constraint.
Measuring local utilization over system throughput.
ref_key_concepts: **Five focusing steps** — identify, exploit, subordinate, elevate, repeat.

description: Especialista em Gestão de Processos (BPM). Use para o ciclo de vida de processos: descoberta, modelagem (BPMN), análise, redesenho, automação e monitoramento. Palavras-chave: BPM, processo, BPMN, automação, redesenho, monitoramento, ciclo de vida.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário gere o ciclo de vida de processos de negócio (BPM end-to-end). Não use só para desenhar (modelagem-de-processos) ou só mapear AS-IS (mapeamento-de-processos).
out_of_scope: Just modeling notation (modelagem-de-processos) and AS-IS mapping (mapeamento-de-processos).
principles: Manage processes end-to-end across silos.
Model, measure, then improve — close the lifecycle loop.
Automate stable, high-volume processes.
Align processes to customer value and strategy.
verify: redesigned process improves KPIs (time, cost, quality) and is monitored
best_practices: Use BPMN to model AS-IS and TO-BE.
Analyze for bottlenecks, handoffs, and waste.
Automate with BPMS/workflow where it pays.
Define process KPIs and monitor continuously.
anti_patterns: Modeling for documentation that's never used.
Automating a broken process ('paving the cow path').
Optimizing one function while the end-to-end suffers.
ref_pitfalls: **Paving the cow path** — fix before automating.
ref_reading: Fundamentals of Business Process Management (Dumas et al.).

description: Especialista em Modelagem de Processos. Use para representar processos com notações (BPMN, fluxogramas, swimlanes), modelos TO-BE e padrões de modelagem. Palavras-chave: modelagem de processos, BPMN, fluxograma, swimlane, TO-BE, notação.
when_to_use: Quando o foco é criar modelos/diagramas de processos com notação correta. Não use para mapear o estado atual (mapeamento-de-processos) ou gerir o ciclo (gestao-de-processos-bpm).
when_use: Apply correct notation and modeling patterns
principles: The model serves a purpose — match detail to audience.
Use standard notation consistently (BPMN).
Show roles via swimlanes; make handoffs explicit.
Model the right altitude — not too coarse, not too fine.
verify: stakeholders read the model unambiguously and it matches intent
best_practices: Use BPMN elements correctly (events, gateways, tasks).
Keep one level of abstraction per diagram.
Use pools/lanes to show responsibilities.
Validate the model with process participants.
anti_patterns: Mixing abstraction levels in one diagram.
Misusing gateways/events (incorrect BPMN).
Over-detailed models nobody can read.

description: Especialista em Mapeamento de Processos. Use para descobrir e documentar o estado atual (AS-IS): entrevistas, gemba, SIPOC, value stream e identificação de gargalos. Palavras-chave: mapeamento de processos, AS-IS, SIPOC, value stream, gargalo, descoberta.
when_to_use: Quando o foco é descobrir/documentar como o processo funciona hoje (AS-IS). Não use para desenhar TO-BE (modelagem-de-processos) ou gerir o ciclo BPM (gestao-de-processos-bpm).
when_use: Run SIPOC and value stream mapping
principles: Capture reality, not the official version of the process.
Go to the gemba and talk to the people doing the work.
Make waste, delays, and handoffs visible.
Map at the level that reveals the problem.
verify: the map matches how work actually happens (validated by doers)
best_practices: Start with SIPOC to scope the process.
Walk the process; interview real performers.
Use value stream mapping to expose delays.
Quantify time, volume, and rework at each step.
anti_patterns: Mapping the idealized, not the actual, process.
Skipping the gemba and guessing.
Maps with no data on time/waste.
